code:
value MinMax
  min: Int
  max: Int
end

fn min_max(_ xs: List<Int>) -> MinMax
  mut lo = xs[0]
  mut hi = xs[0]
  for x in xs
    if x < lo
      lo = x
    end
    if x > hi
      hi = x
    end
  end
  MinMax(min: lo, max: hi)
end

let result = min_max([5, 1, 9, 3, 7, 2])
println("min=#{result.min}")
println("max=#{result.max}")
